chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Hello friends, welcome back to the class 7 of the computer training course.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Today we are going to learn a very important topic,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: how to create, save and edit files in the computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And yes, not only basic, I am also going to show you some corporate tricks

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: which are used by big office professionals to save time.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to become an expert in the computer,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then subscribe to GIS Tech Guru before the video starts.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you will get practical knowledge step by step in the same way.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you have not seen the previous video of this class,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you can go to the description and see the full playlist of the computer class.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So let's start the video without wasting time.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, let's learn how to make a simple text file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For this, we will use a notepad.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But today we will not only learn to run the notepad,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: we will learn to use it professionally.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The same method is used in IT companies,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: used in coding, used in data cleaning,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: used to remove hidden formatting.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So first of all, let's know what is a notepad.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Notepad is a basic text editor.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is no font design in it,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: no extra formatting,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: no layout disturbance,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: that is 100% clean text.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And in the corporate world, clean text is very important.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's see how to open the notepad.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You may remember that we have learned many ways to open a program before.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But today let's see a professional way.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Press Windows plus R on the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Type notepad in the run box.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Press enter.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And see, the notepad is open.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the basic interface of the notepad.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can see some main menus above.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like file, edit, format, view.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's understand them one by one.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: File menu.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The most important menu is

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: to create a new file, click here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or press control plus N on the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To open the file already created,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: or to edit it,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: click on open.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or press control plus O on the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And here is the option to save the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When you press control plus S,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: a dialog box opens.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here on the left side,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: you can see drives and folders.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can select your favorite location.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Write the file name and click on save.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And your file is saved.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: What is the difference between save and save as?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is a very important concept.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is also asked in interviews.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, let's talk about save.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The file is updated on the same name and location.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That is, you made some changes and pressed control plus S.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The old file will be updated.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about save as.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To save the same file copy with a new name,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: or to save on a new location,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: or to save in a separate formatting encoding.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Save as is used in the office to rename the file,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: to make different versions,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: like report, version 1, report, version 2,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: to change the encoding.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on save as.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You will find the encoding option below.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Select UTF-8.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is useful to save website data,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: to avoid special characters errors,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: to make a software compatible file,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: or a small setting will be very useful in the future.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about the editing menu.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The editing menu has those commands

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: that work in almost every software.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you master this shortcut,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then it will be very easy for you to work later.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the undo option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Something was deleted by mistake.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Some line was removed.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Just press control plus Z and the work will come back.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about cut, copy, paste.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to remove the text and take it somewhere else,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then press control plus X.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This will cut the text from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now where you want to paste,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: press control plus V.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The text will come from there.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to make a copy of the text,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then press control plus C.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This will copy the text.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And where you want to paste the copy text,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: press control plus V.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here three shortcuts are useful in every software.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Notepad, Word, Excel, everywhere.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about find.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now suppose you want to find the word 2025 in the document.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Press control plus F with the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Write 2025 in the search box.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then click on find next.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You will see that it is highlighted in blue color.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If there is more 2025 written in the document,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then keep clicking on find next.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about up and down option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How does it work here?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Whenever the find option opens,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then by default it is down selected.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This means that the cursor will search from where it is.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If 2025 is written above the cursor and not below the cursor,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then the search will not be found.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And the message will come, cannot find 2025.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In this situation, select up,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then click on find next.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now the search will be on top of the cursor.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: I will tell you an easy way.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Before finding, bring the cursor to the very start of the document.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then search, there will be no confusion.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then below it, there is find next and find previous.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Which we have learned now.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about the replace option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Replace is the advanced version of find.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Suppose you want to replace 2025 with 2026 in the entire document.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Press control plus H with the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Write 2025 in find what.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Write 2026 in replace.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you have two options.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Replace will only change the current word.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Replace all will change all places in the entire document.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This feature is a lifesaver in data correction.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about the go to option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is used to jump directly to a specific line.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You do not need to scroll manually in large documents.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Give the line number and you will reach there directly.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If the text trap is on, then the go to trap does not work.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then there is the option of select all.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to select the entire document, then press control plus A with the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to insert the current date and time in the notepad,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then press F5 with the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The current date and time will be inserted in the notepad.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about the format menu.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you get two important options.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Word wrap.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Word wrap's job is to automatically adjust the text according to the size of the screen.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When the word wrap is on, the text is adjusted inside the screen.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You do not need to scroll horizontally.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When the word wrap is off, if the line is long, then the text goes to the right side.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And to see you have to use the scroll bar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So it is convenient to keep the word wrap on for beginners.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here is the font option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can change the font style, font size, font type with the font option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But remember that whatever font changes in the notepad will be applied to the entire document.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Not on any one word.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now I give you a corporate tip.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: What happens in the office is that you copy something from the internet and paste it directly in the email or document.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: What is the result of this?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Different formatting, strange fonts, different size.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It looks a little unprofessional here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And it is immediately known that the content has been copied.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So I tell you the best way to do this.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First paste the copy text in the notepad.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Notepad removes all extra formatting.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now copy from there and paste anywhere.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You will get 100% clean text.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This trick is very useful in the corporate office.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's go to the view menu.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you get the option of zoom in and zoom out.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Shortcuts are also written.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you press plus with the control key, it will be zoom in.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And if you press minus with the control key, it will be zoom out.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or press the control key and rotate the mouse wheel back and forth.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Zoom in, zoom out will be done.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The line below is called the status bar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or it shows the information of the cursor position and document.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to hide it, go to the view menu.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Uncheck the checkbox in front of the status bar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The status bar will be hidden.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now our work is complete.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So press control plus s with the keyboard and save the document.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then close the file with the close button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or use the shortcut alt f4.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The file will close from here too.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to see this document again in the future or edit it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So go to the folder where you saved the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Select the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Press the enter key.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And the file will open again.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So far we have learned to make clear text in notepad.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's move to the next level.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about Microsoft Word.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Which is the most popular document editing software in the world.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to make a resume, write a letter,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: want to make a report or project,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: want to do office documentation.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: MS Word is your best friend.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To open the same MS Word,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: type MS Word in the search box and then hit the enter key.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to edit a document from the beginning,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you can open it from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Because we are learning to create a new document.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So we will click on the blank document from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the interface of Microsoft Word.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can see the ribbon on the top of the screen.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Ribbon is the place from where we use most of the commands.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like notepad, there are different tabs here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like Home, Insert, Design, Layout, References, Review, View.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There are many important commands and options in every tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: With the help of which we create, edit and design documents.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If I tell all of them in this video,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then the video will be very long.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When we will do the full detail class of MS Word,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then we will understand each tab in detail and practically.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But now we will learn how to create a basic document,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: how to edit and format the text,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: so that you can start MS Word confidently.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let me write something here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: I have typed a basic document here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now I will teach you some normal editing and text formatting.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, let's learn to select text.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If I want to make this line above the title,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then I will put the cursor in front of it

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and then I will select it by pressing Shift plus right arrow with the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And if you want to select the whole line at once,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then I will take the cursor at the start of the line

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and then I will select it by pressing Shift plus down arrow.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's change its font style.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the Home tab, you can change the font style from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to increase or decrease the font size,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then click on the size number.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To darken the text, click on the option B.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or to bold the text, press Ctrl plus B with the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To make the text triangular, press Ctrl plus I.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This will make the text italic.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And to draw a line below the text, click on U.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or press Ctrl plus U with the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Underline will be applied.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To bring the text in the middle of the page,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: use Ctrl plus E or Center Alignment.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To take it to the left side,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: press Ctrl plus L.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The text will go to the left side.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And press Ctrl plus R.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And the text will go to the right side.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Bullets and numbering are also applied from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can highlight the text from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And you can also change the font color.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the style tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can change a line to heading or title from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Select the line easily.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And go to the style in the home tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on the title.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The line will be converted to the title format.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or you can choose the heading from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: By clicking on more,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: you can see and select more options.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: On the right side of the home tab,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: there is an option to find and replace.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like the same notepad,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: you can also find and replace in the text word.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the insert tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to add a picture in the document,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: click on insert.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Go to picture.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to add from the computer,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: click here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to add online, click here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to make a table, click on table.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We will learn the rest of the options in detail

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: in the full class of avoid.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After the document is ready,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: press Ctrl plus S.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Save it by giving a good name.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Before moving ahead in the video,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: if you like this video,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then like the video.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you are new to the channel,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then don't forget to subscribe to the channel.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's go to Microsoft Excel.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to do data entry,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: want to do calculation,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: want to do data analysis,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: want to do accounting work,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then Excel is the most powerful tool for you.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To open Excel,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: type Excel in the search box.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on open.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on blank workbook.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: I will clear the workbook and worksheet here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as Excel opens,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the entire file that opens

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: is called a workbook.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The different pages in the workbook

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: are called worksheet or spreadsheet.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: By clicking on the plus icon given below,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: you can create a new sheet.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can also right click on any sheet

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and move it by renaming or deleting.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Excel is a very powerful tool.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to do data entry,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: you can also move the sheet.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Before working in Excel,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: it is important to understand its structure.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The A, B, C written above

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: are called columns.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The 1, 2, 3 written on the side

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: are called rows.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The small box where the row and column meet

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: is called a cell.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For example,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: column A plus row 1

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: means A1 is made by combining these two.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is called a cell.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here is our cursor.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is an active cell.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To write data in any cell,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: just click on it once

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: or double click on it

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and start typing.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now I have to write A here,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: so I will type 1,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then 2 below.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now I will select these two

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and take the cursor to this corner of the cell.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as the cursor changes to the plus symbol,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: we will press the left click of the mouse

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and drag the cursor down.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So see, the automatic number

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: will keep on being typed.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The more we leave it, the more the number

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: will be automatically typed.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To go from one cell to the other,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: use the arrow key of the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For example, to go left,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: to go right,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: right, up and down.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Use the arrow key

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: to go to the direction you want to go.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to go to the next line,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then press enter.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to go to the right,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then press the tab button.

text: Hello friends, welcome back to the class 7 of the computer training course. Today we are going to learn a very important topic, how to create, save and edit files in the computer. And yes, not only basic, I am also going to show you some corporate tricks which are used by big office professionals to save time. If you want to become an expert in the computer, then subscribe to GIS Tech Guru before the video starts. Here you will get practical knowledge step by step in the same way. If you have not seen the previous video of this class, then you can go to the description and see the full playlist of the computer class. So let's start the video without wasting time. First of all, let's learn how to make a simple text file. For this, we will use a notepad. But today we will not only learn to run the notepad, we will learn to use it professionally. The same method is used in IT companies, used in coding, used in data cleaning, used to remove hidden formatting. So first of all, let's know what is a notepad. Notepad is a basic text editor. There is no font design in it, no extra formatting, no layout disturbance, that is 100% clean text. And in the corporate world, clean text is very important. Let's see how to open the notepad. You may remember that we have learned many ways to open a program before. But today let's see a professional way. Press Windows plus R on the keyboard. Type notepad in the run box. Press enter. And see, the notepad is open. This is the basic interface of the notepad. You can see some main menus above. Like file, edit, format, view. Now let's understand them one by one. File menu. The most important menu is to create a new file, click here. Or press control plus N on the keyboard. To open the file already created, or to edit it, click on open. Or press control plus O on the keyboard. And here is the option to save the file. When you press control plus S, a dialog box opens. Here on the left side, you can see drives and folders. You can select your favorite location. Write the file name and click on save. And your file is saved. What is the difference between save and save as? This is a very important concept. It is also asked in interviews. First of all, let's talk about save. The file is updated on the same name and location. That is, you made some changes and pressed control plus S. The old file will be updated. Now let's talk about save as. To save the same file copy with a new name, or to save on a new location, or to save in a separate formatting encoding. Save as is used in the office to rename the file, to make different versions, like report, version 1, report, version 2, to change the encoding. Click on save as. You will find the encoding option below. Select UTF-8. It is useful to save website data, to avoid special characters errors, to make a software compatible file, or a small setting will be very useful in the future. Now let's talk about the editing menu. The editing menu has those commands that work in almost every software. If you master this shortcut, then it will be very easy for you to work later. This is the undo option. Something was deleted by mistake. Some line was removed. Just press control plus Z and the work will come back. Now let's talk about cut, copy, paste. If you want to remove the text and take it somewhere else, then press control plus X. This will cut the text from here. Now where you want to paste, press control plus V. The text will come from there. If you want to make a copy of the text, then press control plus C. This will copy the text. And where you want to paste the copy text, press control plus V. Here three shortcuts are useful in every software. Notepad, Word, Excel, everywhere. Now let's talk about find. Now suppose you want to find the word 2025 in the document. Press control plus F with the keyboard. Write 2025 in the search box. Then click on find next. You will see that it is highlighted in blue color. If there is more 2025 written in the document, then keep clicking on find next. Now let's talk about up and down option. How does it work here? Whenever the find option opens, then by default it is down selected. This means that the cursor will search from where it is. If 2025 is written above the cursor and not below the cursor, then the search will not be found. And the message will come, cannot find 2025. In this situation, select up, then click on find next. Now the search will be on top of the cursor. I will tell you an easy way. Before finding, bring the cursor to the very start of the document. Then search, there will be no confusion. Then below it, there is find next and find previous. Which we have learned now. Now let's talk about the replace option. Replace is the advanced version of find. Suppose you want to replace 2025 with 2026 in the entire document. Press control plus H with the keyboard. Write 2025 in find what. Write 2026 in replace. Now you have two options. Replace will only change the current word. Replace all will change all places in the entire document. This feature is a lifesaver in data correction. Now let's talk about the go to option. It is used to jump directly to a specific line. You do not need to scroll manually in large documents. Give the line number and you will reach there directly. If the text trap is on, then the go to trap does not work. Then there is the option of select all. If you want to select the entire document, then press control plus A with the keyboard. If you want to insert the current date and time in the notepad, then press F5 with the keyboard. The current date and time will be inserted in the notepad. Now let's talk about the format menu. Here you get two important options. Word wrap. Word wrap's job is to automatically adjust the text according to the size of the screen. When the word wrap is on, the text is adjusted inside the screen. You do not need to scroll horizontally. When the word wrap is off, if the line is long, then the text goes to the right side. And to see you have to use the scroll bar. So it is convenient to keep the word wrap on for beginners. Here is the font option. You can change the font style, font size, font type with the font option. But remember that whatever font changes in the notepad will be applied to the entire document. Not on any one word. Now I give you a corporate tip. What happens in the office is that you copy something from the internet and paste it directly in the email or document. What is the result of this? Different formatting, strange fonts, different size. It looks a little unprofessional here. And it is immediately known that the content has been copied. So I tell you the best way to do this. First paste the copy text in the notepad. Notepad removes all extra formatting. Now copy from there and paste anywhere. You will get 100% clean text. This trick is very useful in the corporate office. Now let's go to the view menu. Here you get the option of zoom in and zoom out. Shortcuts are also written. If you press plus with the control key, it will be zoom in. And if you press minus with the control key, it will be zoom out. Or press the control key and rotate the mouse wheel back and forth. Zoom in, zoom out will be done. The line below is called the status bar. Or it shows the information of the cursor position and document. If you want to hide it, go to the view menu. Uncheck the checkbox in front of the status bar. The status bar will be hidden. Now our work is complete. So press control plus s with the keyboard and save the document. Then close the file with the close button. Or use the shortcut alt f4. The file will close from here too. If you want to see this document again in the future or edit it. So go to the folder where you saved the file. Select the file. Press the enter key. And the file will open again. So far we have learned to make clear text in notepad. Now let's move to the next level. Now let's talk about Microsoft Word. Which is the most popular document editing software in the world. If you want to make a resume, write a letter, want to make a report or project, want to do office documentation. MS Word is your best friend. To open the same MS Word, type MS Word in the search box and then hit the enter key. If you want to edit a document from the beginning, then you can open it from here. Because we are learning to create a new document. So we will click on the blank document from here. This is the interface of Microsoft Word. You can see the ribbon on the top of the screen. Ribbon is the place from where we use most of the commands. Like notepad, there are different tabs here. Like Home, Insert, Design, Layout, References, Review, View. There are many important commands and options in every tab. With the help of which we create, edit and design documents. If I tell all of them in this video, then the video will be very long. When we will do the full detail class of MS Word, then we will understand each tab in detail and practically. But now we will learn how to create a basic document, how to edit and format the text, so that you can start MS Word confidently. Let me write something here. I have typed a basic document here. Now I will teach you some normal editing and text formatting. First of all, let's learn to select text. If I want to make this line above the title, then I will put the cursor in front of it and then I will select it by pressing Shift plus right arrow with the keyboard. And if you want to select the whole line at once, then I will take the cursor at the start of the line and then I will select it by pressing Shift plus down arrow. Let's change its font style. In the Home tab, you can change the font style from here. If you want to increase or decrease the font size, then click on the size number. To darken the text, click on the option B. Or to bold the text, press Ctrl plus B with the keyboard. To make the text triangular, press Ctrl plus I. This will make the text italic. And to draw a line below the text, click on U. Or press Ctrl plus U with the keyboard. Underline will be applied. To bring the text in the middle of the page, use Ctrl plus E or Center Alignment. To take it to the left side, press Ctrl plus L. The text will go to the left side. And press Ctrl plus R. And the text will go to the right side. Bullets and numbering are also applied from here. You can highlight the text from here. And you can also change the font color. This is the style tab. You can change a line to heading or title from here. Select the line easily. And go to the style in the home tab. Click on the title. The line will be converted to the title format. Or you can choose the heading from here. By clicking on more, you can see and select more options. On the right side of the home tab, there is an option to find and replace. Like the same notepad, you can also find and replace in the text word. This is the insert tab. If you want to add a picture in the document, click on insert. Go to picture. If you want to add from the computer, click here. If you want to add online, click here. If you want to make a table, click on table. We will learn the rest of the options in detail in the full class of avoid. After the document is ready, press Ctrl plus S. Save it by giving a good name. Before moving ahead in the video, if you like this video, then like the video. If you are new to the channel, then don't forget to subscribe to the channel. Now let's go to Microsoft Excel. If you want to do data entry, want to do calculation, want to do data analysis, want to do accounting work, then Excel is the most powerful tool for you. To open Excel, type Excel in the search box. Click on open. Click on blank workbook. I will clear the workbook and worksheet here. As soon as Excel opens, the entire file that opens is called a workbook. The different pages in the workbook are called worksheet or spreadsheet. By clicking on the plus icon given below, you can create a new sheet. You can also right click on any sheet and move it by renaming or deleting. Excel is a very powerful tool. If you want to do data entry, you can also move the sheet. Before working in Excel, it is important to understand its structure. The A, B, C written above are called columns. The 1, 2, 3 written on the side are called rows. The small box where the row and column meet is called a cell. For example, column A plus row 1 means A1 is made by combining these two. This is called a cell. Here is our cursor. This is an active cell. To write data in any cell, just click on it once or double click on it and start typing. Now I have to write A here, so I will type 1, then 2 below. Now I will select these two and take the cursor to this corner of the cell. As soon as the cursor changes to the plus symbol, we will press the left click of the mouse and drag the cursor down. So see, the automatic number will keep on being typed. The more we leave it, the more the number will be automatically typed. To go from one cell to the other, use the arrow key of the keyboard. For example, to go left, to go right, right, up and down. Use the arrow key to go to the direction you want to go. If you want to go to the next line, then press enter. If you want to go to the right, then press the tab button. If you click on any column name like A, B, C, then the entire column will be selected. Similarly, if you click on the row number given on the left, like 1, 2, 3, then the entire row will be selected. This feature is very useful when you want to format the entire column, delete the entire row, or apply formatting on the data at the same time. This name box appears on the upper left side and tells you which cell you are in. For example, you are in A1. After that, there is a formula bar where you can apply the formula. Let's learn about basic formatting. From the home tab, you can change the font style, font size, change the text color, bold the text, center alignment, and basic formatting is done in Excel like Word. Here is the option of wrap text. By clicking on it, if the text is too big, it will be adjusted in one cell in the multiple line. Then you can merge multiple cells from here. If you want, you can select the data and apply the table format. When your work is done, press CTRL S to save the file. So friends, when we start the Excel class, there are many interesting and useful options in it that will come in handy in the future. You are in any sector, you are working in any field, Excel is used a lot somewhere. So friends, in this way, you can easily create, save, and edit files, documents, and spreadsheets in the computer. I hope you have learned a lot new and practical from today's video. Now you can move from the beginner to the professional with GIS Tech Guru in the computer world.
